title: Porting complex workflow state transitions to Go
context: During FEAT-009-a, we successfully ported JSON Schema validation, analytical helpers, and complex task retrying and status mapping to the Go binary.
content: When porting complex workspace/worktree state transitions and status derivations (like PrepareFailedChildRetry and DeriveParentState) from Python to Go, always write robust unit tests leveraging temporary directories (t.TempDir) and minimal Git fixtures. Keep all output logging identical to preserve backwards compatibility with pytest test assertions.
anti_patterns: Do not mix Python and Go schema validation; rather consolidate all validations into a single validate subcommand in the Go binary for consistent error messages.
